description.s: The viewport's view - renders the navigation chrome around the current root item. This is the top-level container that frames all user interaction with Hobson.
: Updates browser tab title to show current item name
: Tracks selected item for context menu operations
: Right-click menu for View As, Add Child, Delete, Copy ID, etc.
The viewport manages the full view resolution hierarchy:
Contextual override (stored in parent's child spec or viewport's root view)
attributes and tooltips to rendered items for:

v.s:
No item selected.

Cmd+K - Search items
Ctrl+\ - Open REPL
Right-click - Context menu

m.s: position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; padding-top: 10vh; z-index: 10000000;

background: var(--color-bg-surface); border-radius: 8px; width: 600px; min-width: 600px; max-width: 90vw; max-height: 70vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); overflow: auto;
